title: oxalis filiformis
intro: Oxalis filiformis, also known as woodland pink sorrel, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. It is native to the southern Andes and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of oxalis filiformis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
